Notice Of Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Benjamin Green
Lisa Oberg, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Plant Insulation
Nikki S. McKennedy, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Plant Insulation Co.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Belva Flanagan's Motion For Sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Plant Insulation Company To Respond To Discovery And To Deem Plaintiff¿S Requests For Admission Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Benjamin Green
Lisa Oberg, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Plant Insulation
Nikki S. McKennedy, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Plant Insulation Co.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Belva Flanagan's Motion To Compel Defendant Plant Insulation Company To Respond To Discovery And To Deem Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions Admitted is moot. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
